title: Unify Projects/SubDAOs card typography and generate new TeleMeetUp image

requirements.text: On the Projects/SubDAOs page (frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx), update the project card styling so ALL project cards use the same text styling: make the text brighter/clearer (no muted/washed-out appearance), use white text for ALL card descriptions (including any bullet points), and keep the same font size and font style across ALL cards’ description content.

quotes:
Make ALL project cards have the same style:

1. Make all text brighter and clearer (not blur) in ALL cards.

2. Use white text for descriptions in ALL cards.

3. Keep the same font size and style across ALL cards.

acceptanceCriteria: On frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx, no project card description text renders using muted gray classes (e.g., text-gray-400) or differing font-size classes between cards; description content uses a consistent font size and style across every card.
All project description text (including TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes bullets and Social Edification bullets) renders in white.
Only styling for text/typography in the project cards is changed; card order, buttons, links, and layout behavior remain unchanged.

requirements.text: Generate a new AI image asset for the “TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes” project card depicting a professional virtual meeting: multiple people visible on a video conference screen, with speech bubbles and/or translation symbols, in a bright, modern design. Add the image to frontend/public/assets/generated and update the TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes project’s imageUrl in frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx to use the new asset.

quotes:
Generate a new AI image for "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes" card showing:
   - Video conferencing with multiple people on screen
   - Speech bubbles or translation symbols
   - Professional virtual meeting atmosphere
   - Bright and modern design

acceptanceCriteria: A new generated image file exists under frontend/public/assets/generated with the specified filename and dimensions.
The TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes card displays the new image on the Projects/SubDAOs page.
No other project card images are changed.

constraints: Apply changes starting from the last published (production) version.
Do not modify any backend code or data models.
Do not change anything on pages other than Projects/SubDAOs (frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx).

Do not change any functionality, links/URLs, button behaviors, project ordering, or non-typography styling beyond what is necessary to make card text brighter/clearer, descriptions white, and description typography consistent across all cards.
nonGoals: Changing project data (names, descriptions, categories, URLs) other than updating the TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes imageUrl to the new generated asset.
Redesigning the card layout, grid layout, hover effects, or button styling/behavior.
Adding new projects or removing existing projects.

required: Bright modern virtual meeting illustration with a video conferencing grid showing multiple participants on screen, plus speech bubbles and translation symbols, professional atmosphere (telemeetup-tmu-notes-project.dim_400x250.png)
